title: Self-Enrichment Teachers
description: Teach or instruct individuals or groups for the primary purpose of self-enrichment or recreation, rather than for an occupational objective, educational attainment, competition, or fitness.

tasks.text: Instruct students individually and in groups, using various teaching methods, such as lectures, discussions, and demonstrations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Adapt teaching methods and instructional materials to meet students' varying needs and interests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare students for further development by encouraging them to explore learning opportunities and to persevere with challenging tasks.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe students to determine qualifications, limitations, abilities, interests, and other individual characteristics.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain accurate and complete student records as required by administrative policy.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Monitor students' performance to make suggestions for improvement and to ensure that they satisfy course standards, training requirements, and objectives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and administer written, oral, and performance tests, and issue grades in accordance with performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish clear objectives for all lessons, units, and projects and communicate those objectives to students.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare instructional program objectives, outlines, and lesson plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with other teachers and professionals to plan and schedule lessons promoting learning and development.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare materials and classrooms for class activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Enforce policies and rules governing students.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review instructional content, methods, and student evaluations to assess strengths and weaknesses, and to develop recommendations for course revision, development, or elimination.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Meet with other instructors to discuss individual students and their progress.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan and conduct activities for a balanced program of instruction, demonstration, and work time that provides students with opportunities to observe, question, and investigate.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Use computers, audio-visual aids, and other equipment and materials to supplement presentations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attend professional meetings, conferences, and workshops to maintain and improve professional competence.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and supervise class projects, field trips, visits by guest speakers, contests, or other experiential activities, and guide students in learning from those activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend staff meetings and serve on committees, as required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select, order, and issue books, materials, and supplies for courses or projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assign and grade class work and homework.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct classes, workshops, and demonstrations, and provide individual instruction to teach topics and skills, such as cooking, dancing, writing, physical fitness, photography, personal finance, and flying.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Instruct and monitor students in the use and care of equipment and materials to prevent injury and damage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Meet with parents and guardians to discuss their children's progress and to determine their priorities for their children.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Schedule class times to ensure maximum attendance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and implement remedial programs for students requiring extra help.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe and evaluate the performance of other instructors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Organize and supervise games and other recreational activities to promote physical, mental, and social development.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in publicity planning and student recruitment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write instructional articles on designated subjects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
